expected_violation.rule: token MUST be rejected because jti appears in the latest valid capability token revocation list even if signature and time window are valid (MACHINE_READABLE_CONTRACTS.md §7.6)

note: All schema-level fields are valid, but jti 00000000-0000-4000-8000-000000000034 is present in the latest valid revocation list, so the business-layer revocation check rejects the token. policy_bundle_hash is structural; 结构示例，非密码学有效证据.
